CustomField.formula:
IF( ISPICKVAL( Price_Plan__r.Payment_Plan__c ,"Tiers"), IF(Tier__c=1, Price_Plan__r.Tier_1_Rate__c , IF(Tier__c=2, Price_Plan__r.Tier_2_Rate__c , IF(Tier__c=3, Price_Plan__r.Tier_3_Rate__c , IF(Tier__c=4, Price_Plan__r.Tier_4_Rate__c ,Price_Plan__r.Tier_5_Rate__c)))), IF( ISPICKVAL( Price_Plan__r.Payment_Plan__c ,"Top 15"), IF( CONTAINS(Country_Name__c, "ROW"), Price_Plan__r.ROW_Rate__c , IF( CONTAINS(Country_Name__c, "Brazil"), Price_Plan__r.ROW_Rate__c , IF( CONTAINS(Country_Name__c, "Russia"), Price_Plan__r.ROW_Rate__c , IF( CONTAINS(Country_Name__c, "New Zealand"), Price_Plan__r.ROW_Rate__c , Price_Plan__r.Top_15_Rate__c )))), IF( ISPICKVAL( Price_Plan__r.Payment_Plan__c ,"Equal Usage"), Price_Plan__r.Usage_Rate__c , (Price_Plan__r.Fixed_Price__c/19)) )
)
CustomField.label: Rate
